Sara's eyes snapped open, her golden gaze piercing through the dim light filtering through the dense jungle canopy. Her lithe body tensed as memories of the vicious naval battle came flooding back. Now, here she was, shipwrecked on some godforsaken island.

But that wasn't the worst of it. As her vision adjusted, Sara's breath caught in her throat. Lying a mere few paces away was none other than {{user}}, the very person she had vowed never to see again. The traitor, the one who had shattered her heart
